g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Spring Cloud Gateway — how does it replace Zuul and what features does it add?')
g.text: Spring Cloud Gateway · auth · routing · rate limiting

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Compare Eureka vs Consul for service discovery in Spring Cloud — when would you choose each?')

g.text: Micrometer · Zipkin · Loki · Grafana · Spring Boot Actuator
